originalTitle: Hoto’s PixelDrive screwdriver is down to $60, matching its best price
summary: If your Prime Day purchases included a new desk, TV stand, bookshelf, or other furniture you still haven’t assembled, Hoto’s PixelDrive cordless screwdriver can help speed up the process. It’s currently on sale for $59.99 ($20 off) at Amazon, matching its best price to date. From tightening loose screws on furniture to repairing electronics, the […]
content: If your Prime Day purchases included a new desk, TV stand, bookshelf, or other furniture you still haven’t assembled, Hoto’s PixelDrive cordless screwdriver can help speed up the process. It’s currently on sale for $59.99 ($20 off) at Amazon, matching its best price to date.  [Product: Hoto PixelDrive Cordless Screwdriver | https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0FKBJL68H?tag=theverge02-20, https://hototools.sjv.io/c/482924/1601240/18215?u=https%3A%2F%2Fhototools.com%2Fproducts%2Fhoto-pixeldrive-cordless-screwdriver%2F] From tightening loose screws on furniture to repairing electronics, the PixelDrive is designed to handle a wide range of household projects. Hoto includes 30 screwdriver bits that cover many of the most common screw types, all neatly organized in a small cylindrical case. It also offers six adjustable torque settings, allowing you to use less power when working with fragile electronics or increase it when putting together a desk, bookshelf, TV stand, or other furniture. You can also switch between a slower 80RPM mode for more precise work and a faster 200RPM mode with the press of a button. Hoto also added several features that make assembling projects a little easier. A built-in display lets you quickly check your current torque setting and remaining battery life, while an integrated LED light helps illuminate dim spaces, whether you’re working under a desk or inside a cabinet. The rechargeable 2,000mAh battery also charges over USB-C, so you won’t need to keep buying disposable batteries.
chineseTitle: Hoto 的 PixelDrive 螺丝刀降至 60 美元，符合最优惠价格
chineseSummary: 如果您在 Prime Day 购买的商品包括新书桌、电视柜、书架或其他尚未组装的家具，Hoto 的 PixelDrive 无绳螺丝刀可以帮助加快组装过程。目前它在亚马逊的售价为 59.99 美元（折扣 20 美元），与迄今为止的最优惠价格相符。从拧紧家具上松动的螺丝到修理电子产品，[...]
chineseContent: 如果您在 Prime Day 购买的商品包括新书桌、电视柜、书架或其他尚未组装的家具，Hoto 的 PixelDrive 无绳螺丝刀可以帮助加快组装过程。目前它在亚马逊的售价为 59.99 美元（折扣 20 美元），与迄今为止的最优惠价格相符。  [产品：Hoto PixelDrive 充电式螺丝刀 | https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0FKBJL68H?tag=theverge02-20、https://hototools.sjv.io/c/482924/1601240/18215?u=https%3A%2F%2Fhototools.com%2Fproducts%2Fhoto-pixeldrive-cordless-screwdriver%2F] 拧紧松动的螺丝从家具到修理电子产品，PixelDrive 旨在处理各种家庭项目。 Hoto 包括 30 个螺丝刀刀头，涵盖许多最常见的螺丝类型，全部整齐地排列在一个小圆柱形盒子中。它还提供六种可调节的扭矩设置，让您在使用易碎电子产品时使用更少的电力，或者在组装桌子、书架、电视柜或其他家具时增加电力。您还可以通过按下按钮在较慢的 80RPM 模式（以实现更精确的工作）和更快的 200RPM 模式之间切换。 Hoto 还添加了一些功能，使组装项目变得更加容易。内置显示屏可让您快速检查当前扭矩设置和剩余电池寿命，而集成 LED 灯有助于照亮昏暗的空间，无论您是在桌子下还是在柜子内工作。 2,000mAh 可充电电池还可通过 USB-C 充电，因此您无需继续购买一次性电池。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
